_comment: IDENTITY.json — the on-disk IdentityRecord superset (doc 13 §13.5). This is the field the deterministic Yama gate and the Kaal-Bhairav boundary actually read; nothing in SOUL/INSTRUCTIONS prose is authoritative against it. Region split per §13.6.

INVARIANT._comment: hashed; boot-gated; editable only at top-gate C/D + GLR ratchet + safety battery + human ratification + armed rollback

floor_binding.floor_content_hash: <bytes32 of live doc-03 PolicyBundle at instantiation>

VARIABLE._comment: editable under tiered reversibility; any new grant OR taint-clearance widening is a GATE-LOOSENING routed through GLR + Capability-Rollout Sequencer (§13.6.2). Only TIGHTENING is free Class-A.

bound_toolset.falsifier: if any read of a crossing artifact is ever treated as a COMMAND rather than DATA, revoke

bound_toolset.names_constraint_relaxed: may inspect genesis-author sig + VC chain + trust-label of a crossing triad; read-only, no key access
bound_toolset.falsifier: if provenance read ever yields signing capability, revoke (keys live only in the HSM)

bound_toolset.names_constraint_relaxed: may read the least-upper-bound derived label of a crossing artifact to compare against egress clearance
bound_toolset.falsifier: if label read is used to LAUNDER taint rather than compare, revoke

bound_toolset.names_constraint_relaxed: verdict is advisory-to-gate only; it cannot self-apply a state change and is overridden by a Yama FAIL
bound_toolset.falsifier: if a verdict ever directly mutates state without passing the external chokepoint, revoke

bound_toolset.names_constraint_relaxed: emit a finding FOR Chitragupta to write; this role never writes the audit fabric itself (Chitragupta is the exclusive scribe)
bound_toolset.falsifier: if this role ever writes directly to the audit store (audit/) or the Akasha-Sutra ledger, revoke

bound_toolset.names_constraint_relaxed: may RECOMMEND a halt to Vishnu (halt-authority holder); never owns or releases a halt
bound_toolset.falsifier: if this role ever asserts or lifts a swarm HALT directly, revoke

bound_toolset.names_constraint_relaxed: Rule-of-Two gate packet MUST display actual bytes/CID + re-bound floor hash + zeroed toolset (Lies-in-the-Loop), never an NL summary
bound_toolset.falsifier: if a human gate is ever presented with an NL summary in place of the low-level object, revoke

VARIABLE._capability_note: This role holds NO spawn-token-mint effect, NO floor-FAIL effect, NO audit-write effect, NO halt-own/release effect, and NO domain-action effect — by construction, honoring Replication-Authority quorum-exclusivity, Yama floor-exclusivity, Chitragupta scribe-exclusivity, and Vishnu halt-authority.

taint_clearance._comment: load-bearing IFC boundary. Widening (raise read-confidentiality OR lower write-integrity) is a GATE-LOOSENING → GLR + Sequencer. Only tightening is free Class-A. This role reads at high confidentiality (it must inspect quarantined crossing artifacts) but writes only at high integrity (verdicts/findings).
